body: It is strongly recommended that the official UMA vote be extended until the errors in the supplementary information are corrected. In the supplementary information, the official stance incorrectly changed the object of media consensus – the ceasefire agreement. The ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah was mistakenly changed to the April 16th ceasefire agreement, thus incorrectly attributing the rules to the ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon as the object of media consensus.
There was no cease-fire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah on April 26! The maximum is between Israel and Lebanon (and that's only according to Trump). But Hezbollah is not Lebanon.

Mutual public announcements? No.
Has any official from both sides even acknowledged a ceasefire exists? No.
Overwhelming consensus from credible sources? No. NO. NO.

Even the side that supposedly announced it — the U.S. — is contradicting this. Marco Rubio told Fox News: “The ceasefire in Lebanon is unique; Israel is at war with Hezbollah, not with Lebanon.”

Meanwhile on Polymarket (as of now), the market is clearly framed as a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

I'm reposting this for awareness: User Clear-Corridor has amassed a staggering 150,362 YES shares (over $36,000 in capital). This is not someone who genuinely believes Hezbollah signed a ceasefire today; this is a hostile oracle takeover attempt.

Here is their playbook:

Buy up cheap "YES" shares while the fundamental reality points to "NO".

Wait for the market to resolve "NO" at 11:59 PM ET tonight.

Immediately Dispute the resolution, forcing it to the UMA Oracle.

Spam the UMA voter channels with the April 23rd Trump headlines ("Ceasefire Extended by 3 Weeks!") and try to scam the token-holders into voting YES based on the Lebanon technicality.
They'll lose anyway, as they lost with the US-Iran ceasefire agreement (same implicit arguments). The only question is whether they only lose money or also time and reputation.

Thanks, i think it doesn't matter what did say Trump. Becouse after he announced a three-week extension of the ceasefire on April 23, Hezbollah issued a sharp rebuke via its Al-Manar TV channel.

Hezbollah MP Ali Fayyad called the truce 'meaningless' as long as Israeli troops remain on Lebanese soil.

The group stated that it reserves the right to 'respond proportionately' to any Israeli actions, effectively disavowing the ceasefire commitment.

According to the rules: "An extension... requires clear public confirmation from both the Israeli government and Hezbollah..."

Since Hezbollah:
– Has not officially confirmed its consent to the extension.
– Has continued its shelling (e.g., the rocket barrage on Shula on April 23, launched during the negotiations).
– Has publicly labeled the agreement as invalid regarding their own actions.
– Has publicly clearly and resolutely declares that continuation of resistance directed at Israeli military targets. – 26.04.2026 ❗️

As of now, this qualifies as a "NO" outcome.

This interpretation reads the media-consensus clause too broadly. The contract is specifically Israel x Hezbollah, and the reporting mainly confirmed an Israel-Lebanon extension announced by Trump, while Hezbollah publicly treated it as meaningless and kept fighting. That is not the same as consensus that an official Israel-Hezbollah extension was reached.

We, the large holders of "yes" shares, must unite. We must denounce the platform; this market is a clear "no." Hezbollah is not the same as Lebanon, according to the rules. Hezbollah has never accepted the continuation of the ceasefire. There is evidence of this. It shouldn't be legal to update the market's additional context after its deadline, in this case, April 26th. They updated the additional context on the 27th. This creates the possibility of markets where they deliberately cheat us to take our money. POLYMARKET, IF YOU TAKE THIS BUSINESS SERIOUSLY, YOU HAVE TO MAKE IT CLEAN. It makes no sense that in the US-Iran referendum the "no" vote wins, and here the "yes" vote wins. HEZBOLA DID NOT SAY IT WAS EXTENDING THE TRUCE.
